content.en:
Ouyang Jiu'er did not give Ye Tian the first level of the complete world to the secret technique, but gave the secret technique a little bit in front, and through this point, it can be seen that this secret technique is not fake.

Regarding Ouyang Jiu'er's approach, Ye Tian also felt that it was very right.

If he directly gave the complete secret technique, if he didn't do it, wouldn't Ouyang Jiu'er lose a lot?

"Jiu'er, where are you going?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Brother Ye, after all, the domain boundary fragment is different from the original location, and it is difficult to find the specific location, but after my exploration, I have locked a general range, as long as I go there, and then look for it slowly, it should not be long before I can find that secret realm!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

Subsequently, Ouyang Jiu'er took Ye Tian out of the Void Heaven True Country and went to a relic space.

At present, the Domain Boundary Fragments are mainly scattered into a relic space, such as the battlefield fragment is a Domain Boundary fragment, and the Infinite Abyss Fragment is also a fragment.

There are many, many such fragments, some fragments are occupied by some sect forces, and some fragments do not have sects, but they are also occupied by domain boundary forces or the major true kingdoms of the Daoshan realm.

For example, the Void Heaven True Kingdom currently occupies a number of domain boundary fragment relics, although it is not occupied alone, but it is also jointly occupied with many forces, and it is constantly developing the resource relics inheritance above.

After all, there are too many Lower Triple Heaven forces that have perished in the Domain Realm, it is simply difficult to calculate, any Lower Triple Heaven Force has countless resources, and some resources cannot even be ignored by the Middle Triple Heaven Force and the Upper Triple Heaven Force.

Ye Tian didn't know which Domain Fragment Ouyang Jiu'er was talking about, but he soon knew.

"Jiu'er, are you sure you're talking about this Domain Fragment?"

Ye Tian asked.

"That's right, it's this Domain Realm Fragment, that secret realm should be right here, let's go in and find it!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"This, let's plan ahead of time, do I know what power this domain fragment has?" Ye Tian looked at Ouyang Jiu'er and said solemnly.

"Which force?"

Ouyang Jiu'er shook his head and asked.

"This Domain Boundary Fragment Space is occupied by the Zixia Sect in the Upper Triple Heaven Forces, although it is not their headquarters, they have also established a branch in this Domain Boundary Fragment Space. Of course, we can also enter this domain realm fragment space, but once we want to enter the secret realm, if we are discovered, we will definitely face up to the Zixia Sect!"

Ye Tian explained.

"Zixia Sect, that Sevenfold Heaven Force?"

Ouyang Jiu'er frowned slightly.

If she still had the strength of a half-step domain ancestor, the Zixia Sect would undoubtedly be an ant in her eyes, but now that she is a true monarch, the Zixia Sect is undoubtedly a behemoth to her now.

"Be careful, you should be fine, aren't you scared?"

Ouyang Jiu'er deliberately provoked.

"Jiu'er, I'm not afraid, if you want to enter, then I'll take you in, if you really encounter an irresistible danger, I will definitely take you away!" Ye Tiandao.

"Hmm!"

Ouyang Jiu'er nodded.

Immediately.

Ye Tian took out a mask, it was the mask of General Black Wind Mountain, this kind of mask was very special, and it was best to hide his identity.

He didn't want to be discovered by the Zixia Sect, it would be very bad for him.

"You're from Blackwind Mountain?"

Ouyang Jiu'er was surprised when she saw Ye Tian's mask.

"How do you know?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Masks are common, and the masks of the Black Wind Mountains look no different from other masks, and only those who have a mask know the magic of masks.

And Ouyang Jiu'er could see at a glance that his mask was from Black Wind Mountain, which was too strange!

"Lonely!" Ouyang Jiu'er glanced at Ye Tian and said, "The mask forging technique of Black Wind Mountain comes from a supreme true ancestor in the Divine Heaven Realm, the Old Man of Forging Heaven. The Old Man of the Forging Heaven forged a large number of masks for the Black Wind Mountain, and I ...... My father knew the old man, so I was very familiar with the skills of the old man. This mask of yours is forged by the Old Man of the Forging Heavens, and the style is the style of the Black Wind Mountain, so I guessed it at once!"

"You don't have a grudge against Black Wind Mountain, do you?"

Ye Tian was a little nervous in his heart.

In case Ouyang Jiu'er had a grudge against Black Wind Mountain, if he was killed in the future, wouldn't he be finished.

"What kind of hatred can I have with Black Wind Mountain? Don't worry, I don't know anyone from Black Wind Mountain, but I just happen to know that the Old Man of Forging Heaven has forged a mask for Black Wind Mountain. However, I do know some of the secrets of the Black Wind Mountain, do you want to know?"

Ouyang Jiu'er looked at Ye Tian.

Ye Tian nodded hurriedly: "I want to know!"

"Let's talk about it later, let's take out the resources of that secret realm first!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

Ye Tian brought a mask, and also gave Ouyang Jiu'er a half-way level mask, although it was far inferior to the mask of Black Wind Mountain, but at least it could be used.

Immediately, Ye Tian took Ouyang Jiu'er to tear through the void and entered the interior of this domain realm fragment space.

When Ye Tian sneaked in, in the branch of the Zixia Sect located in this Domain Realm Fragment Space, a Supreme True Ancestor opened his eyes.

This Supreme True Ancestor is the Le Yan True Ancestor of the Zixia Sect, and he is considered a medium level among the Supreme True Ancestors of the Zixia Sect, and his strength is quite good.

"Someone didn't go through the official entrance and forcibly tore the space in!"

Le Yan True Ancestor frowned.

Immediately, he issued an order for many True Ancestors of this branch to investigate, and if they found any uninvited people, they would immediately arrest them.

When necessary, he will personally take action.

This domain fragment is not small, and there are also a lot of resources, and there are even several incomparably rare divine medicine gardens and mineral veins, and even a few Triple Heaven Force headquarters are slowly being excavated.

At this time, nature does not allow others to destroy.

Even if the True Ancestors of the other Upper Triple Heaven Forces infiltrated in, they would not let it go.

......

"Come in!"

In a forest, the figures of Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er appeared.

"I'll use my secret magic to sense it!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

Ye Tian nodded, acting as a protector, allowing Ouyang Jiu'er to perform the secret technique with peace of mind.

After a long time.

Ouyang Jiu'er finished performing the secret technique, opened his eyes, and said, "In this direction, go forward!"

Ye Tian wrapped Ouyang Jiu'er with his strength and flew quickly, and after about ten minutes of flying, Ye Tian stopped.

"Why did you stop?" Ouyang Jiu'er said in surprise: "It's almost there, it's not far ahead!"

"There are strong people ahead, and there are quite a few, are you sure that your secret realm has not been discovered?" Ye Tian stared at Ouyang Jiu'er with suspicious eyes.

"Under normal circumstances, the Zixia Sect would definitely not be able to find it, even their Dao Ancestor would be difficult to find. But the realm has been shattered, and if there is a problem with my secret realm, it may also be discovered. But one thing is certain, even if the secret realm is discovered, at most some resources on the periphery will be taken away by them, and the most core resources will definitely still be there!" Ouyang Jiu'er said confidently.

Ye Tian sighed and said, "According to my investigation, there are five top true ancestors and thirty ordinary true ancestors there, and it is very likely that they are guarding the secret realm you mentioned. In other words, if we want to enter the secret realm, we must fight hard with the Zixia Sect! If the value of that secret realm is not great, I suggest retreating! Otherwise, we will attract the strongest true ancestors of the Zixia Sect, and I may not be able to withstand it!"

Ouyang Jiu'er gritted her teeth and was unwilling to give up.

Once she obtained the resources of that secret realm, it was enough for her to raise her strength to the Supreme True Ancestor level, or even the Invincible True Ancestor level.

Otherwise, with her current cultivation speed, I'm afraid it will take a long time.

But she also knew very well that just the first level of the world's promotion to the secret art might not be able to make Ye Tian take risks.

Moreover, she knew even more that the first layer of the world's promotion secret technique was a pit, if it was really given to Ye Tian, Ye Tian would probably be angry to death.

So, she has to give another favor.

"Brother Ye, that secret realm has a lot of resources, which has helped me a lot in my current cultivation, and I don't want to give up. If you really helped me seize the resources of that secret realm, I am willing to give you a sword path codex of a supreme sword path ancestor! That codex contains a trace of the mystery of the supreme sword path, if you can comprehend a trace of fur, it will help your strength a lot!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"What, the Dao Codex of the Supreme Dao Dao Ancestor !!"

Ye Tian's heart moved.

For Xeon Kendo, Xeon Kendo, Xeon Kendo...... Ye Tianke had heard of it.

For example, his master, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, was able to cut out a sword comparable to the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestors just by mastering a trace of the supreme sword dao, so that the Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor and the Forbidden Hall Lord were unwilling to offend.

And the bloody general was even more awesome, mastering half of the supreme spear path, thus killing the Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor and a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor who was suppressed by the rules in the realm of invincible True Ancestor.

This shows how powerful these supreme paths are.

And the Dao Codex of the Supreme Sword Dao Dao Ancestor, once he gets it, maybe he will be able to comprehend a trace of the Dao of the Supreme Dao, so that his strength will soar, and in the future, he is even expected to master half or even one percent of the Dao of the Supreme Sword at the level of the True Ancestor!

"Okay, I promise!"

Ye Tian gritted his teeth and nodded.
